title: Vault: keychain-only master key + atomic writes

implement.detail: new src/lib/keychain.ts (macOS security / linux secret-tool / test-ephemeral / keyfile fallback, NO passphrase); vault.ts rewritten to HKDF-from-keychain + writeFileAtomic/writeJsonAtomic 0600; legacy scrypt vault migrated non-destructively; GARRISON_VAULT_PATH override for sandboxing

test.detail: tests/vault.test.ts (7): no-passphrase keychain unlock, write/read roundtrip, sealed-at-rest (value+key absent from disk), 0600 mode, legacy scrypt->hkdf migration, locked-without-unlock. vault-heal(18)+own-port-lifecycle(10) unaffected. typecheck clean.
test.command: npm run typecheck && npx vitest run tests/vault.test.ts tests/vault-heal.test.ts tests/own-port-lifecycle.test.ts

codexReview.detail: reviewed jointly with A2 (combined vault diff); see slices/A2 codexReview — all agreed findings fixed, F2 rebutted as decision F1

codexPwTest.detail: no UI behavior in A1; vault UI is C6

walkthrough.detail: vault sealing story recorded in the Z1 end-to-end proof
